---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or unclear documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: ['documentation', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

**Type:**  
<!-- Select one: Missing / Incorrect / Unclear / Outdated / Typo -->

**Location:**  
<!-- Which file(s) or section(s) are affected? -->
<!-- e.g., README.md, docs/CONTRIBUTING.md, API.md, inline code comments -->

**Affected Audience:**  
<!-- Who is impacted? New contributors / End users / API consumers / Maintainers / All -->

## Current State

**What's Wrong:**  
<!-- Describe the issue with the current documentation -->

**Current Content (if applicable):**  
<!-- Quote or link to the problematic section -->

```markdown
Current documentation excerpt
```

## Proposed Improvement

**Suggested Content:**  
<!-- Provide the corrected or new documentation -->

```markdown
Proposed documentation
```

**Why This Helps:**  
<!-- Explain how this improves clarity, accuracy, or completeness -->

## Context

**Related Documentation:**  
<!-- Link to related docs that should be updated or cross-referenced -->

**Related Code:**  
<!-- If applicable, link to the code this documentation describes -->

**User Journey:**  
<!-- Describe the scenario where someone would need this documentation -->

## Additional Information

**Examples Needed:**  
<!-- Should this include code examples, screenshots, or diagrams? -->

**Cross-References:**  
<!-- Should this link to other docs? Which ones? -->

**Maintenance Notes:**  
<!-- Should this include notes about keeping the docs up-to-date? -->

---

## Documentation Checklist

<!-- For the person implementing this fix -->

- [ ] Content is accurate and matches current codebase
- [ ] Examples are tested and working
- [ ] Cross-references are added where appropriate
- [ ] Terminology is consistent with other docs
- [ ] Grammar and spelling are correct
- [ ] Formatting follows project style guide
- [ ] Related documentation is updated if needed
